description: Style Note Luxurious comfort is teamed with style in these pair of black shoes from gliders. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style or with your regular office wear for a sharp look. Product Details Square toed, slip on black shoes Synthetic upper, has reinforced overlay at the heel collar and elasticated gussets at the side of the tongue Soft footbed with slight padding around the mouth Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with diamond shaped lugs, has branding in the midfoot region and an upraised heel Comes with a shoe bag Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth when required
